hero.title1: Where healthcare meets the art of relaxation,
hero.title2: the true experience of well-being begins
hero.description: Vraja Mării by the Sea — a medical recovery and wellness complex at the highest standards

aboutContent.title: About Us
aboutContent.description: The experience offered is designed as a complete journey toward balance, where healthcare intertwines harmoniously with moments of relaxation and indulgence. Within a setting inspired by the tranquility of the sea and the energy of nature, every day becomes an invitation to revitalize and rediscover inner well-being and equilibrium.
aboutContent.description-2: The sea view, the peaceful rhythm of the days, and the attention paid to every detail create a setting where recovery becomes a pleasant experience and rest takes on a new dimension. Thus, every stay is transformed into time dedicated to restoration, where health, comfort, and elegance unite to offer a revitalization experience that exceeds your expectations.
aboutContent.description-3: In this setting, health care, a relaxing atmosphere, and the elegance of the spaces intertwine to create an experience that exceeds expectations. Every service, every therapy, and every moment spent here is part of a standard of excellence dedicated to well-being and complete revitalization.
aboutContent.description-4: Thus, the stay becomes more than just a simple visit—it becomes an experience where quality, peace, and attention to every guest define the true meaning of hospitality.
aboutContent.visionDescription: We envision a medicine of the future that goes beyond treating symptoms, looking at the person as a whole.
aboutContent.visionDescription-2: Vraja Mării by The Sea aims to become a benchmark in medical rehabilitation and integrative wellness, a place where science, empathy, and nature work together for recovery, prevention, and health optimization.
aboutContent.visionDescription-3: We believe in a gentle, personalized, and conscious approach, adapted to the rhythm of each body.
aboutContent.missionDescription: At Vraja Mării by The Sea, excellence in Medical Rehabilitation, Physical Medicine, and Balneology meets the principles of Functional Medicine to offer our patients an integrative medical concept, unique in the region.
aboutContent.missionDescription-2: Our mission is to support through advanced recovery protocols, innovative technologies, and expertise in Balneology and Physical Medicine.
aboutContent.missionDescription-3: We don't just treat symptoms — we identify and correct the root causes of chronic conditions, for lasting results and overall well-being.

evidenceBased.title: Evidence-Based Medicine
evidenceBased.description: Every protocol is grounded in the latest clinical research.

personalizedCare.title: Personalized Care
personalizedCare.description: Treatments tailored to each patient's needs and goals.

natureHealing.title: Nature-Integrated Healing
natureHealing.description: The sea, air, and natural resources as partners in recovery.

holisticApproach.title: Holistic Approach
holisticApproach.description: We treat the whole person, not just symptoms.

aboutContent.teamDescription: Specialists dedicated to your health and recovery
aboutContent.ctaTitle: Take the first step towards a healthier life
aboutContent.ctaDescription: Our team is ready for a personalized assessment and a recovery plan tailored to your needs.

medicalRehabilitation.title: Medical Rehabilitation
medicalRehabilitation.subtitle: Rebuild. Restore. Recover.
medicalRehabilitation.description: Advanced rehabilitation protocols combining physiotherapy, balneology, and regenerative medicine for post-surgical, post-injury, and chronic condition recovery.
medicalRehabilitation.shortDescription: Advanced rehabilitation protocols for post-surgical, post-injury, and chronic condition recovery.

page.section1Text: Our medical rehabilitation programs are built on the latest clinical research, combining traditional physiotherapy techniques with cutting-edge regenerative medicine.
page.section1Text2: Each treatment plan is personalised by our team of specialists, ensuring optimal recovery outcomes tailored to your specific condition and goals.
page.section2Text: From initial assessment through to discharge, our multidisciplinary team guides you through every stage of rehabilitation with expertise and compassion.
page.section2Text2: Our seaside location provides the ideal environment for recovery — fresh air, natural light, and the therapeutic benefits of the Black Sea coast.

endometriosisInfertility.title: Endometriosis & Infertility
endometriosisInfertility.subtitle: Understand. Nurture. Thrive.
endometriosisInfertility.description: Living with endometriosis or facing fertility challenges means navigating pain, uncertainty, and often feeling unheard. Our integrative protocols combine functional medicine, physiotherapy, and balneology to help restore comfort, hormonal balance, and quality of life.
endometriosisInfertility.shortDescription: Integrative protocols to restore comfort, hormonal balance, and quality of life.

page.section1Text: Endometriosis and infertility require a holistic approach that addresses both the physical symptoms and emotional wellbeing of each patient.
page.section1Text2: Our protocols combine functional medicine diagnostics with evidence-based treatments, creating a comprehensive plan unique to your needs.
page.section2Text: We go beyond managing symptoms to identify root causes — working with hormonal balance, inflammation reduction, and stress management as interconnected pathways to wellness.
page.section2Text2: Our compassionate team understands the emotional weight of these conditions and provides a supportive, judgement-free environment throughout your journey.

longevity.title: Longevity
longevity.subtitle: Optimise. Regenerate. Flourish.
longevity.description: Aging well isn't about turning back the clock — it's about giving your body the tools to thrive. Our longevity programs blend advanced diagnostics, cryotherapy, and regenerative therapies designed uniquely for you.
longevity.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics and regenerative therapies to help you age well, on your own terms.

page.section1Text: Our longevity programs combine advanced diagnostics with regenerative therapies to help you age on your own terms — proactively, not reactively.
page.section1Text2: Through comprehensive biomarker analysis and personalised interventions, we create a roadmap for sustained vitality and peak performance.
page.section2Text: From cryotherapy to IV nutrient therapy, our regenerative protocols are designed to enhance cellular function, reduce oxidative stress, and support your body's natural repair mechanisms.
page.section2Text2: Regular monitoring and program adjustments ensure you're always progressing toward your optimal health benchmarks.

rheumatology.title: Rheumatology
rheumatology.subtitle: Ease. Strengthen. Move.
rheumatology.description: Specialised rheumatology programs combining balneotherapy, physiotherapy, and functional medicine to manage autoimmune and inflammatory conditions — reducing pain and restoring mobility.
rheumatology.shortDescription: Balneotherapy, physiotherapy, and functional medicine to reduce pain and restore mobility.

page.section1Text: Rheumatic and autoimmune conditions demand specialised, ongoing care. Our programs combine proven balneological traditions with modern functional medicine.
page.section1Text2: We focus on reducing inflammation, managing pain, and restoring mobility — so you can return to the activities that matter most.
page.section2Text: Romania's rich balneological heritage offers unique therapeutic resources. Our programs harness mineral-rich waters, therapeutic mud, and climate therapy backed by decades of clinical evidence.
page.section2Text2: Combined with physiotherapy and functional medicine, these natural treatments provide lasting relief beyond what medication alone can achieve.

postChemotherapy.title: Post-Chemotherapy Rehabilitation
postChemotherapy.subtitle: Support. Recover. Heal.
postChemotherapy.description: Compassionate integrative care designed to support patients after chemotherapy — managing side effects, restoring vitality, and nurturing recovery.
postChemotherapy.shortDescription: Integrative care to manage side effects and restore vitality after chemotherapy.

page.section1Text: The journey doesn't end with chemotherapy. Our post-treatment rehabilitation focuses on rebuilding strength, managing lingering side effects, and supporting your body's return to balance.
page.section1Text2: Each program is carefully adapted to your treatment history and current condition, ensuring a safe and effective path to renewed energy.
page.section2Text: Recovery from chemotherapy affects every aspect of wellbeing. Our integrative approach addresses physical fatigue, immune function, and emotional resilience as interconnected elements of healing.
page.section2Text2: In a peaceful seaside setting, surrounded by nature and supported by experienced professionals, you'll find the space to truly recover.

magnetotherapy.name: Magnetotherapy
magnetotherapy.description: Therapeutic magnetic fields to reduce pain, stimulate circulation, and support tissue regeneration.
magnetotherapy.longDescription:
Magnetotherapy is a modern therapy in the field of medical recovery, where magnetic fields become subtle instruments that support the body's natural healing mechanisms. Through their delicate action, they help reduce pain and inflammation, stimulate circulation, and support tissue regeneration processes.

The procedure is often recommended for musculoskeletal conditions — from arthrosis and lower back pain to post-traumatic recovery stages — where it can provide real support in restoring functionality.

Through its gentle, nearly imperceptible yet deeply relaxing effect, magnetotherapy becomes a discreet ally in the recovery process, accompanying the patient on the path to regaining mobility and well-being.

mudWraps.name: Sapropelic mud wraps
mudWraps.description: Therapeutic mud from Lake Techirghiol with anti-inflammatory, detoxifying, and deeply relaxing properties.
mudWraps.longDescription:
Sapropelic mud wraps are among nature's most treasured gifts in recovery therapy. Enriched with minerals and bioactive substances, this mud with remarkable properties acts gently on the body, offering anti-inflammatory, detoxifying, and deeply relaxing effects on the muscles.

The procedure is especially recommended for rheumatic conditions, joint and muscle pain, spondylosis, or lower back pain, as well as during post-traumatic recovery stages. At the same time, it stimulates circulation and contributes to deep relaxation that encompasses the entire body.

Through its soothing warmth and the therapeutic properties drawn from the depths of Lake Techirghiol, the mud offers not only relief for the body but also a state of balance and well-being that envelops the entire organism.

laserTherapy.name: Laser therapy
laserTherapy.description: Therapeutic light to stimulate cellular regeneration, reduce inflammation, and diminish pain.
laserTherapy.longDescription:
Laser therapy represents one of the most refined technologies used in modern medical recovery, acting delicately at the cellular level to stimulate the body's natural regeneration processes. Therapeutic light penetrates deep into the tissues, supporting their restoration, reducing inflammation, and contributing to pain reduction in a safe, precise, and controlled manner.

Integrated into a personalised treatment plan, laser therapy becomes a valuable support in the recovery process, accelerating healing and gradually restoring joint mobility and physical comfort. Through its biostimulatory effect, it activates the body's natural mechanisms, promoting tissue regeneration and improving local circulation.

The procedure is frequently used for musculoskeletal conditions, muscle or tendon injuries, joint pain, and post-traumatic recovery stages. Through its precise and non-invasive technology, laser therapy adds efficiency to recovery treatments, transforming the healing process into a faster, gentler, and more harmonious journey for the body.

electrostimulation.name: Electrostimulation
electrostimulation.description: Fine electrical impulses to reactivate muscles, reduce pain, and improve circulation.
electrostimulation.longDescription:
Electrostimulation is a modern technique that harnesses fine electrical impulses to reactivate and support the natural strength of the muscles. Through carefully controlled signals, muscles are stimulated to contract in a manner similar to natural movements, thus contributing to regaining tone and functionality.

This delicate yet effective method helps stimulate weakened muscles, reduce inflammation and pain, and improve local circulation. At the same time, it supports the body's recovery processes, often being integrated into rehabilitation programmes following trauma or periods of immobilisation.

Carried out under carefully controlled conditions and adapted to each patient's needs, electrostimulation harmoniously complements personalised treatment plans. Through its gentle rhythm and deep action on the muscles, this therapy becomes a valuable support on the path to regaining mobility, strength, and physical balance.

decontractingMassage.name: Decontracting massage
decontractingMassage.description: Therapeutic massage to release muscle tension, stimulate circulation, and induce deep relaxation.
decontractingMassage.longDescription:
Decontracting massage is one of the oldest and most refined forms of therapy dedicated to the body's balance. Through precise gestures and controlled pressure, the therapist helps the muscles release accumulated tension and overcome local rigidity or blockages that may appear as a result of effort, stress, or incorrect posture.

By stimulating circulation and tissue oxygenation, massage promotes toxin elimination and supports the body's natural regeneration processes. Muscles gradually regain their elasticity, and the body rediscovers its sense of lightness and freedom of movement.

Beyond its physical benefits, decontracting massage also has a profound dimension of emotional balance. The calm rhythm of the manoeuvres contributes to stress reduction, soothes the nervous system, and induces a state of deep relaxation where mind and body find a natural harmony.

Thus, caring for the muscles becomes more than a gesture of comfort: it is an investment in long-term health, vitality, and the well-being that allows us to move and live with greater freedom and balance.

ultrasoundTherapy.name: Ultrasound therapy
ultrasoundTherapy.description: High-frequency sound vibrations to relax muscles, reduce inflammation, and regenerate tissues.
ultrasoundTherapy.longDescription:
Ultrasound therapy is an expression of modern technology, a delicate procedure that works silently, deep within the tissues, where the body finds its natural resources for recovery. Through high-frequency sound vibrations, invisible and imperceptible, therapeutic energy penetrates deeply and activates the subtle mechanisms of regeneration.

Under the action of these fine waves, tense muscles begin to relax, circulation intensifies, and inflammatory processes gradually diminish. Tissues are thus stimulated to recover, and the body rediscovers its balance and mobility.

Gentle, non-invasive, and profoundly effective, ultrasound therapy is often integrated into recovery programmes for muscular and joint conditions or post-traumatic recovery periods. Through its action, this procedure becomes a silent ally of healing, accompanying the body in its natural process of regeneration and restoring, step by step, the harmony of movement and well-being.

mudBath.name: Mud bath
mudBath.description: A regeneration ritual with mineral-rich mud for detoxification, deep relaxation, and revitalisation.
mudBath.longDescription:
The mud bath is one of the most precious experiences offered by natural therapies, a true ritual of pampering and regeneration for body and mind. In the velvety warmth of mineral-rich mud, the body begins to unwind, and accumulated tensions melt slowly, giving way to a profound state of relaxation and balance.

Its therapeutic properties act delicately on the skin and tissues, stimulating circulation, nourishing the body with valuable minerals, and supporting natural revitalisation processes. Every moment spent in this bath becomes an experience of reconnecting with nature's energy, where the body recharges and the senses calm.

Thus, the mud bath transforms into a genuine spa ritual, where health care blends harmoniously with the pleasure of relaxation. The result is a profound state of well-being, a sensation of vitality and freshness that reflects throughout the entire body.

tecarTherapy.name: TECAR therapy
tecarTherapy.description: Therapeutic energy transferred deep into tissues for regeneration, muscle relaxation, and pain reduction.
tecarTherapy.longDescription:
TECAR therapy is a modern recovery experience where technology and the body's natural intelligence work together to restore balance and vitality. Through therapeutic energy transferred deep into the tissues, this procedure activates natural regeneration mechanisms, supporting the body to recover in a harmonious and efficient way.

The subtle warmth generated within the tissues stimulates cellular metabolism and local circulation, promoting muscle relaxation, pain reduction, and accelerating recovery processes. Thus, the body gradually rediscovers its natural rhythm of healing, and mobility and physical comfort return naturally.

Integrated into a personalised recovery programme and carried out under the careful guidance of specialists, TECAR therapy transforms the healing process into a refined experience of revitalisation. It is a procedure that combines the precision of modern technology with deep care for health, providing the body with the support needed to regain strength, freedom of movement, and well-being.

kinesiotherapy.name: Kinesiotherapy
kinesiotherapy.description: Personalised exercises to restore mobility, strength, and body balance.
kinesiotherapy.longDescription:
Kinesiotherapy is the art of rediscovering movement and body balance. Through carefully chosen exercises adapted to each need, this form of therapy transforms movement into a delicate yet powerful instrument of recovery and revitalisation. Each exercise is a sure step towards regaining mobility, strength, and confidence in one's own body.

Under the guidance of specialists, kinesiotherapy programmes are designed to support the body's natural recovery processes, correct muscular imbalances, and restore freedom of movement to the joints. Gradually, the body rediscovers its harmony, and movement returns naturally, without pain or limitations.

More than a recovery method, kinesiotherapy is an invitation to reconnect with your own body. At your own pace, progressively, it restores vitality, supports long-term health, and transforms each stage of recovery into a process of rediscovering balance and well-being.

admission.label: Patient Guide
admission.title: Admission Process
admission.description: Patient admission (retirees, employees, children, uninsured) is carried out following a prior appointment obtained either by phone or by visiting the reception, confirmed by our Reservations team and processed in our system after the advance payment has been made.

insuranceCheck.title: Check Your Insurance Status
insuranceCheck.description: You can check your insurance status yourself, as well as the status of your health card, by accessing the link below and entering your Personal Identification Number (CNP)
insuranceCheck.warning: If this check reveals any discrepancies with your situation (for example, you appear as uninsured, the card appears as issued but you have not received it, etc.), please resolve the situation before arriving, so that you can use your referral (otherwise, our services can only be accessed at full cost).

documents.label: Preparation
documents.title: Required Documents
documents.description: To avoid any unpleasant situations, please bring all the documents required for your admission:

items.employment: Employment certificate / last pension coupon: ONLY FOR OPSNAJ INSURED

yourStay.label: Your Experience
yourStay.title: Your Stay
yourStay.p1: Upon arrival, you will check in at the Marea Neagră reception to complete the necessary documentation for your stay and sign the medical services contract, receive your room assignment according to your booking, and schedule your specialist medical consultation to establish your treatment plan.
yourStay.p2: This is recorded on an individual treatment form, with which you will be directed to the scheduling and procedure planning service, where your treatment times will be assigned. Daily, after completing your treatment, you will hand in the treatment form at the treatment center reception, and collect it the following day at the start of your treatment.

refusal.title: Right of Refusal
refusal.description: We reserve the right to refuse admission or discharge patients who present undeclared conditions incompatible with medical rehabilitation treatment, as well as patients who do not fulfill their conduct and/or financial obligations specified in the contract/patient obligations.

dailyVisit.title: Daily Medical Visit
dailyVisit.description: Being present in your room and cooperating with our team for the daily medical visit is mandatory. In your room you have access to the phone number where you can contact on-duty medical staff, at any hour, regarding any aspect of your health condition.

discharge.title: Discharge
discharge.description: Discharge mandatorily requires the use of your health card; failure to do so will result in the case not being reimbursed and the patient bearing the full costs.

contraindications.absoluteWarning: Patients who present at least one of the following contraindications are not recommended for inpatient treatment!

absolute.malignantTumors: Recently discovered or operated malignant tumors, leukemia
absolute.infectious: Infectious diseases – TB, herpes zoster, acute hepatitis, etc.
absolute.mobilityImpaired: Patients with severe mobility limitations or visual impairment without a companion
absolute.recentBleeding: Recent unhealed internal or external hemorrhages
absolute.dialysis: Patients on renal dialysis and/or with stage III/IV chronic kidney failure

contraindications.relativeNote: Patients who present at least one of the relative contraindications must bring their medical records at admission and, only upon written recommendation/approval from their attending physician (neurologist / cardiologist / oncologist / nephrologist), will be informed that the treatment will be limited and adapted to their associated pathology.

items.recentCoronary: recent coronary conditions – stent or bypass

items.limitedFunction: acute/chronic nephropathies with limited functional reserves

patientGuide.closingNote: By respecting all of the above, you are respecting yourself and those around you. We assure you that our team is made up of professionals who want you to have the most pleasant experience with us, both in terms of comfort and therapeutic benefits.

directions.parking: Free parking available on the complex grounds.

form.title: Send Us a Message

form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

q1.question: How can I book an appointment?
q1.answer: You can request an appointment by filling out the form on our website or calling our phone number. Our team will contact you for confirmation.

q2.question: What should I bring for admission?
q2.answer: You'll need: a referral letter for Medical Rehabilitation, your health card, ID card, and proof of employment or latest pension slip (for OPSNAJ insured patients). Full details in the Patient Guide.

q3.question: How long is a typical stay?
q3.answer: The length of stay varies depending on the treatment program recommended by the doctor, usually 7 days.

q4.question: Do you accept uninsured patients?
q4.answer: Yes, we accept uninsured patients as well. In this case, services are accessed at full cost. Contact us for pricing details.

q5.question: How can I check my insurance status?
q5.answer: You can verify your insurance status on the CNAS website at siui.casan.ro/asigurati/ by entering your personal identification number (CNP).

q6.question: Is a referral letter required?
q6.answer: Yes, for insured patients a referral letter for Medical Rehabilitation issued by a family doctor or specialist is required.

q7.question: Does the complex offer parking?
q7.answer: Yes, free parking is available on the complex grounds.

q8.question: Can I visit the complex before booking?
q8.answer: Of course! We'd love to have you. We recommend calling ahead to ensure a team member is available to show you around.

telemedicine.title: Telemedicine Consultation
